input: Run output engineering on this project
expected_behavior: Skill activates and produces the expected output engineering output following the defined process
Skill recognizes the trigger phrase and executes the output engineering workflow

input: Apply output engineering to analyze the current codebase with detailed output
expected_behavior: Skill produces comprehensive output engineering analysis with evidence-tagged findings
